cadence_note: ILOSTAT publishes no fixed release calendar; the indicator table of contents (https://rplumber.ilo.org/metadata/toc/indicator) shows last.update moving for most of the ~1951 indicators within any given month, in rolling batches rather than on a date. Checked weekly; MAINTAIN_SPECS compares each indicator's last.update against the raw parquet, so a tick with nothing republished downloads nothing.
